name: meridian-ds
description: Meridian MD design system registry. Clinical Restrained, dark-only, Linear-native, AI-agent ready.

items.name: decision-card
items.title: DecisionCard
items.description: Care Plan action card with Do, Why, Goal answer shape.
items.prompt: Use the Meridian MD design system. Import DecisionCard from @/clinical/DecisionCard. Create care plan actions with Do, Why, Goal shape. Evidence is a single-line footer. Do not use SOAP fields, decorative accent, or muted text on card surfaces.

items.name: domain-pane
items.title: DomainPane
items.description: Risk domain pane with model output, ranked drivers, evidence, and care plan handoff.
items.prompt: Use the Meridian MD design system. Import DomainPane from @/clinical/DomainPane. Build a physician risk-domain pane with named model output, ranked drivers, evidence footer, and care plan entry point. Do not use patient marketing voice or decorative color.

items.name: ask-surfaces
items.title: Ask surfaces
items.description: Contextual AI surfaces: inline popover, right-edge pane, command entry, launcher.
items.prompt: Use the Meridian MD design system. Import Ask surfaces from @/primitives/Ask. Add contextual AI help with Inline and right-edge push pane only. Every assistant answer needs a source line. Do not add a floating chatbot, third panel, or accent-colored inline trigger.
